description: Designed and implemented low-current electrical systems including CCTV, fire alarm, and access control infrastructure
Collaborated cross-functionally with engineering teams on project design, planning, and implementation
Applied analytical problem-solving and system optimization techniques to improve design efficiency
Managed end-to-end daily operations including staff coordination and customer service delivery
Designed and delivered interactive training sessions on traffic rules and safety concepts
Trained and mentored junior staff members to improve operational efficiency and service quality
